title: Cubex Construct
move_pattern: Starts with Submerge (Gain 15 Block), then Charge Up (Gain 2 Strength), then Repeater Blast → Repeater Blast → Expel Blast, looping back to Repeater Blast → Repeater Blast → Expel Blast indefinitely.
notes: Spawns with 13 Block and 1 Artifact (negates one debuff). Starts submerged (Submerge gains 15 Block), then charges up gaining 2 Strength. Then fires Repeater Blast twice (8 damage + 2 Strength each time) followed by Expel Blast (6 damage x2), cycling back to double Repeater. The charging SFX loops during the charged attack phase. Skin is randomized from eye and moss options.
